title: rosa carolina f. triloba
intro: Rosa carolina f. triloba, also known as the American wild rose, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible hips. The medicinal properties of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa carolina f. triloba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
